title: 20th-Anniversary folk-art poster screen-print separation pack — approved master vectorized, white underbase + 4 spot-colour halftone plates with dot-gain choke, a grain-textured proof, the authored registration sheet rendered out of Illustrator, and a campus-reference Firefly board
one_line_ask: From the approved folk-art 20th-Anniversary master, produce a print-ready 5-screen separation pack (white underbase + four spot-colour halftone plates with a dot-gain choke), a vectorized hard-edge lettering/line plate, a grain-textured client proof, the registration/separation sheet rendered out of the supplied Illustrator template (PDF, PNG and SVG as three separate render passes), and a Firefly board of the campus reference photos for the screen printer.

panel.text_found:
BAYOU CROSS CLASSICAL ACADEMY
OAK-LINED QUADRANGLE
COMMUNITY FEAST
20 YEARS - 2006-2026

issues: Minor: the 'OAK-LINED QUADRANGLE' banner label is relatively small and slightly cramped but legible
Minor: lute/mandolin instrument appears twice (left and right sides) creating slight redundancy
Minor: community feast scene is dense and slightly crowded at bottom but within folk-art style intent
Acceptable: slight soft edges on fine decorative scrollwork — designer fix
panel.text_found: BAYOU CROSS CLASSICAL ACADEMY | OAK-LINED QUADRANGLE | COMMUNITY FEAST | 20 YEARS - 2006-2026

issues: Very slight dappled shadow pattern across facade may complicate color-sampling for tone matching, but acceptable as natural lighting condition
Steeple/spire partially cropped at top center — minor compositional note but does not obscure primary subject
Potted fern plants flanking doors are slightly asymmetric in size — negligible for reference use
Very slight warm colour cast on wall — within acceptable designer-fix range
Minor glass reflection visible at top-left corner — authentic/intentional
Brass plate text fully legible and correctly rendered
Photo within photo shows natural slight fading consistent with archival look
Slight luminance noise in shadow areas under portico (acceptable for source file)
Stone plaque texture slightly smoother than aged brick — minor tonal contrast issue for print
Column base casting minor halo artifact where it meets step edge
Foreground student is slightly left of center but within acceptable composition range
Spanish moss rendering is highly convincing but has minor repetitive texture patterns in upper canopy — acceptable for source asset
Lamp post on right edge is partially cropped — minor framing note for designer

assets.name: separations.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
